title: NIH Clinical Center Research Studies | NIH News in Health
content: April 2026 Print this issue Featured Website NIH Clinical Center Research Studies Send us your comments (link sends e-mail) Find clinical research studies taking place at NIH’s Clinical Center. The Clinical Center hosts a wide range of studies from rare diseases to chronic health conditions. Volunteers are needed for conditions being studied and healthy volunteers. Search by diagnosis, sign, or symptom. Visit the website: clinicalstudies.info.nih.gov
